reasoning: Candidate is a tall vertical barrier/gate sprite placed against a peer family of compact, roughly-square metallic helmet sprites. Accounting for item-type difference per instructions, the style-level analysis still reveals severe discontinuities. (1) OUTLINE WEIGHT: peers carry uniform moderate-weight black pixel outlines; candidate outlines are thinner and inconsistent on the arch curvature sections. (2) OUTLINE COLOR: both use black — consistent, no penalty. (3) SHADOW DIRECTION: peers uniformly lighter upper-left, darker lower-right; candidate shadow direction is ambiguous, front face is predominantly flat white. (4) SHADOW COUNT: peers show 1-2 distinct shading bands; candidate has almost none on the main body panel. (5) HIGHLIGHT INTENSITY: candidate's teal/blue/white top cluster is overlit relative to every peer — blows past the family's restrained specular. (6) COLOR TEMPERATURE: peer family is cool-neutral silver/steel with warm red and gold accents; candidate is cold-white and blue with no warm tones — temperature band entirely outside family range. (7) DETAIL DENSITY: peers are densely detailed with visors, rivets, crests; candidate body is sparse flat white, detail concentrated only at decorative crown. (8) PROPORTION: peers are 1:1 to 1:1.2 aspect ratio; candidate is roughly 1:2.5 portrait — extreme outlier even for a barrier. (9) RENDERING STYLE: peers use dithered metallic gradients characteristic of Denzi style; candidate uses flat fill with decorative pixel mosaic at top — feels closer to UI tileset than Echo equipment sprite. (10) PALETTE OVERLAP: near-zero overlap; peers share a gray/silver/gold/red palette, candidate introduces white, sky-blue, teal not present in peer swatches. (11) CHARM LEVEL: peer helmets carry the 'cute Echo equipment' personality through rounded forms and expressive shapes; candidate reads as a cold architectural prop with no personality — charm registers as zero against the family baseline. Overall: fails on 9 of 11 dimensions at a style level, independent of item-type.
